title: What’s going on with Developers and AI?
summary: Google Cloud Tech explores how AI tools are transforming software development, examining the evolution from early coding through the LLM era. The video highlights how tools like Google AI Studio are lowering barriers to application development and argues that the present is an exciting time for developers.
